description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow has three jobs: pre-commit, test, and test-aarch64. The pre-commit job checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs pre-commit checks. The test job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs tests with pytest. The test-aarch64 job runs on a matrix of Python versions, sets up QEMU, checks out the repository, and runs tests in a Docker container.
